$-- StockEase Page Template ======================= Pandoc HTML template used by the docs pipeline to render all individual architecture documentation pages. Variables injected by Pandoc at build time: $title$ — page title from the Markdown front matter $body$ — rendered HTML content from the Markdown source $root$ — relative path back to target/docs/ root (e.g. "../.." for depth-2 pages) calculated per file by generate-docs.sh and passed via --metadata=root: Layout: sticky header + two-column grid (sidebar | content) + footer. Sidebar is built dynamically from the navigation map in the script below. Stylesheets (paths are relative via $root$ so they resolve at any nesting depth): base.css — CSS variables, reset, typography, layout component.css — sidebar, cards, code, tables, mermaid, print Dependencies: Mermaid.js v10 (CDN) — renders architecture diagrams from fenced code blocks $
StockEase Docs
Home / Documentation
GitHub Docs Home
$body$
StockEase — Inventory Management System View on GitHub Documentation Home
$-- Sidebar navigation ================== Built dynamically so a single source of truth covers all pages. Sections are collapsible via
/. The section containing the active page is expanded automatically on load. To add or remove a section, edit the navigation object below. Active link is highlighted based on the current page URL. $ $-- Mermaid diagram rendering ========================= Renders architecture diagrams written as fenced mermaid code blocks in Markdown. The Lua filter in the docs pipeline converts them to
elements before Pandoc processes the HTML. $
